other_observers: Debra Deininger; 17 Dec reported on ebird 25 Dec reported by Ken Kinyon on nature.net 26 Dec Cole Wild, heard only
description: I observed an American Robin sized thrush with a blueish back and orange belly with black auriculars and black chest band. The wings had orange spots.Behaviors: I observed the bird in a front yard of an suburban neighborhood foraging for cranberries close to shrubs in front of the house.Call: possibly heard the short whistle like callPlumage: adult
